instructions: This is Kalakaarian — a D2C influencer marketplace monorepo (npm workspaces: client, server, packages/models).
Read CLAUDE.md before making any changes. For UI work also read client/CLAUDE.md; for API work read server/CLAUDE.md.
95% Rule: only make code changes when 95% confident. Read all relevant files (schema, middleware, routes) first.
200-line limit: keep every file under 200 lines. Split controllers by concern, services by platform.
Never weaken security: do not remove rate limiters, escapeRegex, mongo-sanitize, or auth guards to make tests pass.

Server key contracts: use AuthRequest (not req as any), bidAmount (not price), connectDB() cached pattern, applyPlatformMargin() on all brand-facing pricing reads, CORS_ORIGINS env var (never origin: '*').
Server is serverless-only (no app.listen). Local dev uses vercel dev from repo root.
Only server/src/ is deployed — server/{controllers,models,routes,utils} without src/ are dead code.
Pre-ship: typecheck, lint, test must pass before pushing to main.
Storage auth token key is kalakariaan_token (historical typo — keep it).
